summary: The diff shows backend/main.mo fully migrated to DuckDuckGo (no Google references), and frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts audited with no Google API URLs or OAuth references. Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear substantially addressed. The SearchInterface component summary also confirms DuckDuckGo-only rendering. No hallucinated features were detected beyond reasonable error-handling improvements aligned with the requirements.
